title: Crispy Savory Cherry Toast
description: A savory and crispy brunch dish inspired by Slovakian cuisine featuring fresh cherries in a sugar-free-friendly preparation.

ingredients.name: 6 slices of bread
ingredients.notes: Select a type of bread that will crisp up nicely, such as sourdough or rye.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh cherries
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe but firm cherries for best texture.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons honey-free jam
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is sugar-free and low in sodium if possible.

ingredients.name: 3-4 teaspoons unsalted butter, melted
ingredients.notes: Use a low-fat variety for dietary considerations.

instructions: Slice the bread into thin rounds if not already sliced.
Spread a small amount of honey-free jam on each slice of bread, slightly overlapping but leaving some space for topping.
Arrange cherry halves in alternating positions around each piece of toast, ensuring they are evenly distributed and visible from both sides of the toast.
Drizzle melted butter over the cherries to help them adhere better to the toast.
Place the toasted slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone mat for easy cleanup.
Bake in preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, until the edges turn golden brown and the jam is bubbling but not too dark.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving hot.
